blocks.text: This page is the canonical onboarding checklist. New engineers should complete every section in order during their first two weeks.
Receive your laptop from IT and complete the FileVault setup.
Sign in to Google Workspace, Slack, GitHub, and 1Password using your @example.com email.
Request access to the engineering-prod 1Password vault from your manager.
Clone the rag-knowledge-ops monorepo. Run `docker compose up` to bring up the full stack locally.
Run the seed script via `make seed` to populate demo data, then sign in at http://localhost:7000 with the demo credentials printed by the script.
Pick a `good-first-issue` ticket from the engineering board, open a PR, and pair with the on-call engineer for review.
